title: Creamy Indian Chestnut Mushroom Curry
description: A savory and molten Indian curry dish featuring chestnut mushrooms, made with sous-vide cooking for a low-sodium friendly meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat and saute the onions until they are translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced chestnut mushrooms to the pan and cook until they release their moisture and start browning.
Add the curry powder to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the coconut milk, tomato puree, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir well.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let it cook for 10 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
Use a sous-vide machine to cook the curry at 180 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and serve the curry hot over rice or with naan bread.
